headline: Q4 Rundown: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) Vs Other Data & Business Process Services Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who not so much). Let’s take a look at how data & business process services stocks fared in Q4, starting with Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO).
